LanguageData.UB_SNS_AdultHost.title: Game show host
LanguageData.UB_SNS_AdultHost.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years hosting an interplanetary game show titled 'Who's in my Yayo?' The show brought [PAWN_objective] to Urbworld and Glitterworld stardom, with thousands of viewers across hundreds of planets. Unfortunately, [PAWN_nameDef]'s show was cancelled for 'embellishing the use of narcotics and other illegal substances', as well as smuggling actual drugs across intergalactic lines.
